_source: Understanding Exposure by Bryan Peterson, Light Science & Magic, Digital Photography Complete Course
_note: Long-tail photography knowledge. Exposure triangle, lighting ratios, metering modes, post-processing workflows.

aperture.function: Controls depth of field and light amount
aperture.relationship: Each full stop = 2× or 1/2× light; f/2.8 to f/4 = -1 stop = half the light

depth_of_field.wide_open: f/1.4-f/2.8; shallow DOF; blurred background (bokeh); portraits
depth_of_field.mid_range: f/4-f/8; moderate DOF; environmental portraits, street photography
depth_of_field.stopped_down: f/11-f/22; deep DOF; landscapes, architecture; entire scene in focus

aperture.diffraction: f/16+ causes diffraction; soft image; sweet spot typically f/8-f/11 for sharpness

shutter_speed.function: Controls motion blur and light amount
shutter_speed.reciprocal_rule: Minimum handheld shutter = 1/focal_length; 50mm lens = 1/50s minimum (or use IBIS/VR)

motion.freeze_action: 1/500s+ for sports; 1/1000s+ for fast action; 1/2000s+ for birds in flight
motion.creative_blur: 1/30s or slower; waterfalls, light trails, intentional camera movement
motion.long_exposure: Multiple seconds to minutes; ND filters needed in daylight; smooth water, star trails

iso.base_iso: Usually 100 or 200; cleanest image, highest dynamic range
iso.acceptable_range: ISO 100-1600 on modern cameras; 3200-6400 acceptable with noise reduction
iso.high_iso: 6400+ visible noise; use when aperture maxed and shutter can't go slower; denoise in post
iso.auto_iso: Set max ISO limit (e.g., 3200); camera adjusts to maintain exposure

metering_modes.evaluative_matrix: Analyzes entire scene; multi-zone; good general purpose; can be fooled by bright/dark backgrounds
metering_modes.center_weighted: Emphasizes center 60-80%; ignores extreme edges; portraits
metering_modes.spot_metering: Measures 1-5% of frame; precise control; meter off subject's face, expose for highlights
metering_modes.highlight_weighted: Prevents blown highlights; useful for high-contrast scenes

exposure_compensation.usage: Override camera's meter; +/- EV; adjust when scene fools meter

examples.snow_beach: +1 to +2 EV; prevent gray snow/sand; expose brighter
examples.dark_subjects: -1 to -2 EV; prevent overexposure; black dog in shade
examples.backlit_subjects: +1 to +1.5 EV or use fill flash; prevent silhouette

exposure_compensation.zebras_blinkies: Highlight warning; flashing areas = blown highlights; adjust exposure or use graduated ND

natural_light.golden_hour: 1 hour after sunrise, 1 hour before sunset; warm, soft, directional; best for portraits/landscapes
natural_light.blue_hour: Before sunrise, after sunset; diffused, even light; long exposures; cityscapes
natural_light.midday_harsh: Overhead sun; harsh shadows; high contrast; avoid for portraits or use fill flash/reflector
natural_light.overcast: Soft, diffused light; low contrast; great for portraits, even skin tones; colors saturated

studio_lighting_ratios.lighting_ratio: Key light to fill light ratio; controls contrast

ratios.1_1: Equal key and fill; flat, no shadows; product photography
ratios.2_1: Key 1 stop brighter; subtle shadows; beauty, headshots
ratios.4_1: Key 2 stops brighter; dramatic; fashion, character portraits
ratios.8_1: Key 3 stops brighter; very dramatic; low-key, film noir

studio_lighting_ratios.measurement: Incident meter at subject position; point toward key, then fill; compare readings

lighting_patterns.rembrandt: Key 45° to side, slightly above; triangle of light on shadow cheek; classic portrait lighting
lighting_patterns.loop: Key 30-45° to side, above; nose shadow points toward corner of mouth; flattering for most faces
lighting_patterns.split: Key 90° to side; half face lit, half shadow; dramatic, masculine
lighting_patterns.butterfly: Key directly in front, above; shadow under nose; beauty/glamour lighting
lighting_patterns.broad_short: Broad = light on side of face toward camera; Short = light on side away; short slims face

light_modifiers.softbox: Large source = soft light; 2-4ft for portraits; closer = softer; quality of light depends on apparent size
light_modifiers.umbrella: Shoot-through (soft, even) or reflective (more directional); inexpensive, portable
light_modifiers.beauty_dish: Mid-contrast; punchy yet soft; fashion, beauty; 22-28" typical
light_modifiers.octabox: 8-sided softbox; round catchlights in eyes; flattering for portraits
light_modifiers.grids_snoots: Restrict light spread; focused beam; hair light, background accent, dramatic effects
light_modifiers.scrims_flags: Block or diffuse light; control spill; shape light

flash_techniques.ttl_vs_manual: TTL auto-adjusts power; fast but inconsistent; Manual consistent but requires test shots
flash_techniques.high_speed_sync: Flash above max sync speed (1/250s typical); fill flash in bright sun; reduces power
flash_techniques.rear_curtain_sync: Flash at end of exposure; motion blur before sharp freeze; light trails behind subject
flash_techniques.stroboscopic: Multiple pops during long exposure; multiple images of moving subject in one frame

composition.rule_of_thirds: Divide frame into 9 sections (3×3 grid); place subjects on intersections; horizon on top or bottom third
composition.leading_lines: Use lines (roads, fences, rivers) to guide eye to subject; create depth
composition.framing: Use natural frames (windows, arches, branches) around subject; adds depth and context
composition.negative_space: Empty space around subject; minimalist; draws attention to subject; breathing room
composition.symmetry_patterns: Symmetry (reflections, architecture); patterns broken by subject; visual interest
composition.foreground_interest: Include foreground element in landscapes; create depth; lead eye into frame

perspective.eye_level: Neutral; viewer feels connection; most common
perspective.low_angle: Shoot upward; subject looks powerful, dominant; dramatic sky
perspective.high_angle: Shoot downward; subject looks vulnerable, small; flat lay, birds-eye
perspective.dutch_angle: Tilted horizon; dynamic, unsettling; action, energy

raw_workflow.white_balance: Correct color cast; 5500K daylight, 3200K tungsten, 6500K shade; use eyedropper on neutral gray
raw_workflow.exposure_adjustment: Adjust overall brightness; +/- 2 stops safe in RAW; watch histogram
raw_workflow.highlights_shadows: Recover blown highlights (-100); lift shadows (+30-50); maintain contrast
raw_workflow.contrast: S-curve for punch; lift blacks slightly, drop whites slightly; or use tone curve
raw_workflow.clarity: Midtone contrast; +10 to +30 typical; oversharpening >50; use radial filter for selective clarity

color_grading.hsl_sliders: Hue (shift color), Saturation (intensity), Luminance (brightness) per color channel
color_grading.split_toning: Different colors in highlights and shadows; teal/orange popular; subtle (saturation 10-25)
color_grading.color_wheels: Lift (shadows), Gamma (midtones), Gain (highlights); shift color in each tonal range
color_grading.luts: Lookup tables; apply color grade preset; starting point, adjust to taste

sharpening.amount: 50-80 for portraits; 80-120 for landscapes; depends on subject detail
sharpening.radius: 0.8-1.2 pixels typical; controls edge width; too high = halos
sharpening.detail: Controls fine detail vs broad sharpening; 20-40 typical
sharpening.masking: Hold Alt/Option while adjusting; white edges = sharpened; isolate sharpening to edges only

noise_reduction.luminance_nr: Reduces brightness noise; 30-60 typical; preserves detail
noise_reduction.color_nr: Reduces color speckles; 50-80 typical; less destructive than luminance
noise_reduction.ai_denoise: Topaz, DxO, Lightroom Denoise; excellent results; use on high-ISO images before other edits

frequency_separation.purpose: Separate texture from color/tone; retouch skin without losing texture
frequency_separation.process: Duplicate layer; blur one (color), high-pass other (texture); retouch blur layer for even skin tone
frequency_separation.use: Portrait retouching, product photography, remove blemishes without softening skin

dodging_burning.dodge: Lighten areas; bring out details in shadows; brighten eyes, teeth
dodging_burning.burn: Darken areas; add depth; tone down bright distractions; vignette
dodging_burning.technique: Low opacity brush (10-20%); build up gradually; non-destructive on separate layer

sensor_sizes.full_frame: 36×24mm; equiv to 35mm film; no crop factor; shallow DOF, better low-light
sensor_sizes.aps_c: ~24×16mm; 1.5× crop (Nikon/Sony) or 1.6× (Canon); lighter, cheaper, more reach
sensor_sizes.micro_four_thirds: 17.3×13mm; 2× crop; compact, deep DOF, excellent for wildlife with long lenses
sensor_sizes.crop_factor: Multiply focal length; 50mm on APS-C (1.5×) = 75mm equivalent field of view

lens_specifications.prime_vs_zoom: Prime = fixed focal length, sharper, wider aperture, lighter; Zoom = versatile, heavier, slower

focal_lengths.normal: 40-60mm; similar to human vision; versatile; 50mm f/1.8 'nifty fifty'
focal_lengths.portrait: 85-135mm; flattering compression; shallow DOF; 85mm f/1.8 ideal
focal_lengths.telephoto: 200-400mm; wildlife, sports; compression; tripod or fast shutter needed
focal_lengths.super_telephoto: 500-800mm; birds, distant wildlife; expensive, heavy, requires support

lens_specifications.image_stabilization: In-body (IBIS) or lens (VR/IS/OSS); 3-5 stops advantage; shoot handheld at slower speeds

file_formats.raw: Unprocessed sensor data; 12-14 bit; maximum editing flexibility; large files (20-50 MB)
file_formats.jpeg: Processed, compressed; 8-bit; smaller files (3-10 MB); less editing headroom; fine for most uses
file_formats.tiff: Uncompressed or lossless; 16-bit; huge files; use for archival or after editing RAW
